name: Create bar priority lane
description: Separate the drink tickets that are actively blocking table flow from the rest of the bar queue so urgent beverage work becomes visible and protected.
source_ref: core-v2: redesign workflow at the beverage node by exposing table-critical priority work
entry_conditions: Bar tickets are delaying table progression or guests are waiting on drinks that gate the next service step.
The venue can distinguish truly table-critical tickets from normal queue volume.
contraindications: Do not create a second queue without explicit rules for what qualifies as priority work.
Do not use this lane to hide structural understaffing or broken bar setup.
proof_of_completion: A visible priority lane exists for bar work that blocks table progression.
The bar team can explain the rule for entering and clearing priority tickets.
At least one pressured service shows faster resolution of table-critical drink tickets.
